skills.name: site-navigation
skills.description: Find the right public Ghost Orgy page for a request by routing questions to the homepage, lore, artifacts, press kit, threshold page, or sister pages.

skills.name: brand-lore
skills.description: Explain Ghost Orgy's public mythology, themes, and Nine Sisters canon using the lore and sister pages without inventing backstory.

skills.name: contact-platforms
skills.description: Retrieve official Ghost Orgy contact information, streaming profiles, and social links from the public press materials and homepage.
